location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

infrastructure.description: The infrastructure the data controller is running on.

onPremiseProperty.description: Properties from the Kubernetes data controller

uploadWatermark.description: Properties on upload watermark.  Mostly timestamp for each upload data type

lastUploadedDate.description: Last uploaded date from Kubernetes cluster. Defaults to current date time

basicLoginInformation.description: Deprecated. Azure Arc Data Services data controller no longer expose any endpoint. All traffic are exposed through Kubernetes native API.

metricsDashboardCredential.description: Login credential for metrics dashboard on the Kubernetes cluster.

logsDashboardCredential.description: Login credential for logs dashboard on the Kubernetes cluster.

logAnalyticsWorkspaceConfig.description: Log analytics workspace id and primary key

uploadServicePrincipal.description: Deprecated. Service principal is deprecated in favor of Arc Kubernetes service extension managed identity.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Arc Data Controller resource.

clusterId.description: If a CustomLocation is provided, this contains the ARM id of the connected cluster the custom location belongs to.

extensionId.description: If a CustomLocation is provided, this contains the ARM id of the extension the custom location belongs to.

id.description: A globally unique ID identifying the associated Kubernetes cluster

publicSigningKey.description: Certificate that contains the Kubernetes cluster public key used to verify signing

signingCertificateThumbprint.description: Unique thumbprint returned to customer to verify the certificate being uploaded

metrics.description: Last uploaded date for metrics from kubernetes cluster. Defaults to current date time

logs.description: Last uploaded date for logs from kubernetes cluster. Defaults to current date time

usages.description: Last uploaded date for usages from kubernetes cluster. Defaults to current date time

clientId.description: Client ID of the service principal for uploading data.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID of the service principal.

authority.description: Authority for the service principal. Example: https://login.microsoftonline.com/

name.description: The name of the extended location.

type.description: The type of the extended location.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

basicLoginInformation.description: Username and password for basic authentication.

lastUploadedDate.description: Last uploaded date from Kubernetes cluster. Defaults to current date time

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Azure Arc-enabled PostgreSQL instance.

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier.

name.description: The name of the SKU.  It is typically a letter+number code

dev.description: Whether dev/test is enabled. When the dev field is set to true, the resource is used for dev/test purpose.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

basicLoginInformation.description: Username and password for basic authentication.

lastUploadedDate.description: Last uploaded date from Kubernetes cluster. Defaults to current date time

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Arc-enabled SQL Managed Instance resource.

activeDirectoryInformation.description: Active Directory information related to this SQL Managed Instance.

licenseType.description: The license type to apply for this managed instance.

clusterId.description: If a CustomLocation is provided, this contains the ARM id of the connected cluster the custom location belongs to.

extensionId.description: If a CustomLocation is provided, this contains the ARM id of the extension the custom location belongs to.

replicas.description: This option specifies the number of SQL Managed Instance replicas that will be deployed in your Kubernetes cluster for high availability purposes. If sku.tier is BusinessCritical, allowed values are '2' or '3' with default of '3'. If sku.tier is GeneralPurpose, replicas must be '1'.

default.description: The kubernetes scheduling options. It describes restrictions used to help Kubernetes select appropriate nodes to host the database service

resources.description: The kubernetes resource limits and requests used to restrict or reserve resource usage.

requests.description: Requests for a kubernetes resource type (e.g 'cpu', 'memory'). The 'cpu' request must be less than or equal to 'cpu' limit. Default 'cpu' is 2, minimum is 1. Default 'memory' is '4Gi', minimum is '2Gi. If sku.tier is GeneralPurpose, maximum 'cpu' is 24 and maximum 'memory' is '128Gi'.

limits.description: Limits for a kubernetes resource type (e.g 'cpu', 'memory'). The 'cpu' request must be less than or equal to 'cpu' limit. Default 'cpu' is 2, minimum is 1. Default 'memory' is '4Gi', minimum is '2Gi. If sku.tier is GeneralPurpose, maximum 'cpu' is 24 and maximum 'memory' is '128Gi'.

keytabSecret.description: Keytab secret used to authenticate with Active Directory.

mode.description: Transparent data encryption mode. Can be Service Managed, Customer managed or disabled

protectorSecret.description: Protector secret for customer managed Transparent data encryption mode

forceencryption.description: If 1, then SQL Server forces all connections to be encrypted. By default, this option is 0

tlsciphers.description: Specifies which ciphers are allowed by SQL Server for TLS

tlsprotocols.description: A comma-separated list of which TLS protocols are allowed by SQL Server

keytabInformation.description: Keytab information that is used for the Sql Managed Instance when Active Directory authentication is used.

tier.description: The pricing tier for the instance.

dev.description: Whether dev/test is enabled. When the dev field is set to true, the resource is used for dev/test purpose.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

version.description: The SQL Server version the license covers.

uniqueId.description: The unique ID of this license. This is a GUID-formatted string (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000).

physicalCores.description: The number of total cores of the license covers.

activationState.description: The activation state of the license.

scopeType.description: The Azure scope to which the license will apply.

activatedAt.description: The timestamp of the activation of the SqlServerEsuLicense in ISO 8601 date-time format.

terminatedAt.description: The timestamp of the termination of the SqlServerEsuLicense in ISO 8601 date-time format.

tenantId.description: The tenantId the SQL Server ESU license resource subscription resides in.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

containerResourceId.description: ARM Resource id of the container resource (Azure Arc for Servers).

vmId.description: The unique ID of the hybrid machine that this resource belongs to.

createTime.description: The time when the resource was created.

vCore.description: The number of logical processors used by the SQL Server instance.

cores.description: The number of total cores of the Operating System Environment (OSE) hosting the SQL Server instance.

discoverySource.description: Indicates the discovery agent or client for this instance.

dbMasterKeyExists.description: Indicates whether database master key exists in SQL Server.

isHadrEnabled.description: Indicates whether always On availability groups is enabled in SQL Server.

traceFlags.description: An array of integers, where each value represents the enabled trace flags in SQL Server.

tcpDynamicPorts.description: Dynamic TCP ports used by SQL Server.

tcpStaticPorts.description: Static TCP ports used by SQL Server.

azureDefenderStatusLastUpdated.description: Timestamp of last Azure Defender status update.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Arc-enabled SQL Server resource.

lastInventoryUploadTime.description: The time when last successful inventory upload was performed.

lastUsageUploadTime.description: The time when last successful usage upload was performed.

hostType.description: Type of host for Azure Arc SQL Server

alwaysOnRole.description: The role of the SQL Server, based on availability.

backupPolicy.description: The backup profile for the SQL server.

upgradeLockedUntil.description: Upgrade Action for this resource is locked until it expires. The Expiration time indicated by this value. It is not locked when it is empty.

bestPracticesAssessment.description: The configuration related to SQL best practices assessment.

serviceType.description: Indicates if the resource represents a SQL Server engine or a SQL Server component service installed on the host.

maxServerMemoryMB.description: maximum server memory (MB) value configured for this instance.

isMicrosoftPkiCertTrustConfigured.description: Indicates whether Microsoft PKI root-authority certificate (trusted by Azure) exists in SQL Server and trusted for Azure database.windows.net domains.

isDigiCertPkiCertTrustConfigured.description: Indicates whether DigiCert PKI root-authority certificate (trusted by Azure) exists in SQL Server and trusted for Azure database.windows.net domains.

authentication.description: Authentication related configuration for the SQL Server Instance.

endpointName.description: Name of the database mirroring endpoint.

connectionAuth.description: The type of connection authentication required for connections to this endpoint

port.description: The port number that the endpoint is listening on.

isDynamicPort.description: Is the port number dynamically assigned.

id.description: The GUID of the SQL Server's underlying Failover Cluster.

networkName.description: The network name to connect to the SQL FCI.

sqlInstanceIds.description: The ARM IDs of the Arc SQL Server resources, belonging to the current server's Failover cluster.

hostNames.description: The host names which are part of the SQL FCI resource group.

hostIPAddresses.description: The IP addresses and subnet masks associated with the SQL Failover Cluster Instance on this host.

retentionPeriodDays.description: The retention period for all the databases in this managed instance.

fullBackupDays.description: The value indicating days between full backups.

differentialBackupHours.description: The differential backup interval in hours.

transactionLogBackupMinutes.description: The value indicating minutes between transaction log backups.

enabled.description: Indicates if monitoring is enabled for this SQL Server instance.

targetSelectedTime.description: The last time when the target resource was selected for migration.

targetResourceId.description: Resource Id of the created or selected target SQL resource for migration.

enabled.description: Indicates if migration assessment is enabled for this SQL Server instance.

assessmentUploadTime.description: The time when Migration Assessment Report upload was last performed.

assessmentViewedTime.description: The time when this migration assessment was last viewed.

targetRecommendationGenerationTime.description: The UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format indicating when the latest target recommendations were generated for this SQL Server instance. This value is set as part of a successful RunTargetRecommendation job and is independent of when the migration readiness results were uploaded (assessmentUploadTime).

version.description: version of this migration assessment report - to be passed by the migration assessment engine.

settings.description: Settings impacting the migration assessment computation - configurable with some default values if not set.

serverAssessments.description: Issues and warnings impacting the migration of SQL Server instance to particular Azure Migration Target.

skuRecommendationResults.description: SKU Recommendation results for Azure migration targets for SQL Server.

impactedObjectsSummary.description: Represents a summary of migration readiness issues/warnings per feature type for Azure SQL DB and SQL MI targets

targetLocation.description: The target location for Azure SQL SKU for migration. Default is West US.

percentile.description: Indicate the percentile value for the performance sample. Default is 95th percentile.

lookbackPeriodInDays.description: How far back to check the performance data - Default is 30 (days).

comfortFactor.description: Buffer (percentage) to consider while SKU sizing to account for issues such as seasonal usage, short performance history, and likely increases in future usage - This buffer is applied on top of the performance metrics. Default is 100 (percent).

strategy.description: Minimize cost or Migrate to PaaS. - to evaluate based on the recommended strategy. Default is Migrate to PaaS

currency.description: currency to calculate prices - Default is USD.

discountPercentage.description: flat discount percentage to apply for the price - Default is 0

computeAndStorageCostOption.description: selected cost saving option e.g. With1YearASPAndDevTest.

sqlLicenseCostOption.description: With Azure Hybrid Benefit(AHB) or not for SQL.

windowsLicenseCostOption.description: With Azure Hybrid Benefit(AHB) or not for Windows.

azureSqlDatabase.description: SKU Recommendation results for Azure SQL Database.

azureSqlManagedInstance.description: SKU Recommendation results for Azure SQL Managed Instance.

azureSqlVirtualMachine.description: SKU Recommendation results for Azure SQL Virtual Machine.

recommendationStatus.description: The target recommendation Status for this database.

numberOfServerBlockerIssues.description: Number of blocker issues to fix before migrating to the target platform.

monthlyCost.description: The monthly cost of the particular SKU.

monthlyCostOptions.description: The monthly cost for all different savings options applicable for the particular SKU.

sqlLicenseCost.description: Represents the Cost of SQL license.

windowsLicenseCost.description: Represents the Cost of Windows license.

keyName.description: The unique combination of saving options for a price e.g. With1YearASPAndProd.

keyValue.description: The Monthly cost of the particular SKU.

storageMaxSizeInMb.description: maximum storage for this particular SKU, in MB.

predictedDataSizeInMb.description: The predicted data size in MB in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

predictedLogSizeInMb.description: The predicted log size in MB in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

maxStorageIops.description: The maximum storage IOPS in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

maxThroughputMBps.description: The maximum throughput in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

computeTier.description: The compute tier of the target SKU.

hardwareType.description: The hardware type of the target SKU.

sqlPurchasingModel.description: The SQL purchasing model of the target SKU.

sqlServiceTier.description: The SQL service tier of the target SKU.

zoneRedundancyAvailable.description: Indicates if zone redundancy is available for the target SKU.

numberOfServerBlockerIssues.description: Number of blocker issues to fix before migrating to the target platform.

numberOfServerBlockerIssues.description: Number of blocker issues to fix before migrating to the target platform.

monthlyCost.description: The monthly cost of the particular SKU.

monthlyCostOptions.description: The monthly cost for all different savings options applicable for the particular SKU.

predictedDataSizeInMb.description: The predicted data size in MB in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

predictedLogSizeInMb.description: The predicted log size in MB in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

availableVmSkus.description: Available VM SKUs for the Azure SQL Virtual Machine.

virtualMachineFamily.description: The virtual machine family of the target SKU.
Virtual Machine Family, for example : standardMSFamily

azureSkuName.description: Virtual Machine SKU name,: Eg : Standard_F16s.

vCPUsAvailable.description: Available vCores. This can be less than the vCores in the Constrained vCPU VM Sizes.

size.description: Size of the managed disk - e.g. P30, P40.

caching.description: Caching configuration - e.g. read only caching

featureId.description: Represents the feature id from https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/data-migration/sql-server/database/assessment-rules?view=azuresql. OR https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/data-migration/sql-server/managed-instance/assessment-rules?view=azuresql

enabled.description: Indicates if SQL best practices assessment is enabled for the SQL Server instance.

startTime.description: Indicates the start time for the trigger. The default value is the time at which the trigger was created.

timeZone.description: The time zone in which the trigger is scheduled.

expression.description: A cron string representing a CronTab expression. A crontab expression is a very compact way to express a recurring schedule with the following format: '{minutes} {hours} {days} {months} {days-of-week}'.

enabled.description: Indicates if client connection is enabled for this SQL Server instance.

sqlServerEntraIdentity.description: Entra Authentication configuration for the SQL Server Instance.

identityType.description: The method used for Entra authentication

clientId.description: The client Id of the Managed Identity to query Microsoft Graph API. An empty string must be used for the system assigned Managed Identity.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

physicalCores.description: The number of total cores of the license covers.

licenseCategory.description: This property represents the choice between SQL Server Core and ESU licenses.

activationState.description: The activation state of the license.

scopeType.description: The Azure scope to which the license will apply.

lastActivatedAt.description: The timestamp of the most recent activation of the SqlServerLicense.

lastDeactivatedAt.description: The timestamp of the most recent deactivation of the SqlServerLicense.

tenantId.description: The tenantId the SQL Server license resource subscription resides in.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

domainServiceAccountLoginInformation.description: Username and password for domain service account authentication.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Active Directory connector resource.

realm.description: Name (uppercase) of the Active Directory domain that this AD connector will be associated with.

netbiosDomainName.description: NETBIOS name of the Active Directory domain.

serviceAccountProvisioning.description: The service account provisioning mode for this Active Directory connector.

ouDistinguishedName.description: The distinguished name of the Active Directory Organizational Unit.

primaryDomainController.description: Information about the Primary Domain Controller (PDC) in the AD domain.

hostname.description: Fully-qualified domain name of a domain controller in the AD domain.

domainName.description: DNS domain name for which DNS lookups should be forwarded to the Active Directory DNS servers.

nameserverIPAddresses.description: List of Active Directory DNS server IP addresses.

replicas.description: Replica count for DNS proxy service. Default value is 1.

preferK8sDnsForPtrLookups.description: Flag indicating whether to prefer Kubernetes DNS server response over AD DNS server response for IP address lookups.

lastUpdateTime.description: The time that the custom resource was last updated.

observedGeneration.description: The version of the replicaSet associated with the AD connector custom resource.

state.description: The state of the AD connector custom resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the failover group resource.

partnerManagedInstanceId.description: The resource ID of the partner SQL managed instance.

spec.description: The specifications of the failover group resource.

status.description: The status of the failover group custom resource.

sharedName.description: The shared name of the failover group for this SQL managed instance. Both SQL managed instance and its partner have to use the same shared name.

sourceMI.description: The name of the SQL managed instance with this failover group role.

partnerMI.description: The name of the partner SQL managed instance.

partnerMirroringURL.description: The mirroring endpoint URL of the partner SQL managed instance.

partnerMirroringCert.description: The mirroring endpoint public certificate for the partner SQL managed instance. Only PEM format is supported.

partnerSyncMode.description: The partner sync mode of the SQL managed instance.

role.description: The role of the SQL managed instance in this failover group.

properties.description: Properties of Arc Sql Server availability group

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

availabilityGroupId.description: ID GUID of the availability group.

vmId.description: The unique ID of the hybrid machine that this resource belongs to.

collectionTimestamp.description: Timestamp for when the data was collected from the client machine.

replicas.description: A list of Availability Group Replicas.

databases.description: A list of Availability Group Database Replicas.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Arc-enabled SQL Server availability group resource.

failureConditionLevel.description: User-defined failure condition level under which an automatic failover must be triggered.

healthCheckTimeout.description: Wait time (in milliseconds) for the sp_server_diagnostics system stored procedure to return server-health information, before the server instance is assumed to be slow or not responding.

automatedBackupPreferenceDescription.description: Preferred location for performing backups on the availability databases in this availability group.

version.description: SQL Server availability group current version.

basicFeatures.description: Specifies whether this is a basic availability group.

dtcSupport.description: Specifies whether DTC support has been enabled for this availability group.

dbFailover.description: Specifies whether the availability group supports failover for database health conditions.

isDistributed.description: Specifies whether this is a distributed availability group.

clusterTypeDescription.description: SQL Server availability group cluster type description

requiredSynchronizedSecondariesToCommit.description: The number of secondary replicas that must be in a synchronized state for a commit to complete.

isContained.description: SQL Server availability group contained system databases.

primaryReplica.description: Name of the server instance that is hosting the current primary replica.

primaryRecoveryHealthDescription.description: Indicates the recovery health of the primary replica.

secondaryRecoveryHealthDescription.description: Indicates the recovery health of a secondary replica.

synchronizationHealthDescription.description: Reflects a roll-up of the synchronization health of all availability replicas in the availability group.

listener.description: The listener for the sql server availability group

dnsName.description: the DNS name for the listener.

ipV4AddressesAndMasks.description: IP V4 Addresses and masks for the listener.

ipV6Addresses.description: IP V6 Addresses for the listener

port.description: Network port for the listener. Default is 1433.

nextLink.description: Link to retrieve next page of results.

replicaId.description: ID GUID of the availability group.

replicaResourceId.description: Resource id of this replica. This is required for a distributed availability group, in which case it describes the location of the availability group that hosts one replica in the DAG. In a non-distributed availability group this field is optional but can be used to store the Azure resource id for AG.

endpointName.description: Name of the mirroring endpoint URL

endpointUrl.description: Mirroring endpoint URL of availability group replica

endpointAuthenticationMode.description: Permitted authentication modes for the mirroring endpoint.

certificateName.description: Name of certificate to use for authentication. Required if any CERTIFICATE authentication modes are specified.

endpointConnectLogin.description: The login which will connect to the mirroring endpoint.

availabilityMode.description: Property that determines whether a given availability replica can run in synchronous-commit mode

availabilityModeDescription.description: The Availability Synchronization mode of the availability group replica.

failoverMode.description: Property to set the failover mode of the availability group replica

failoverModeDescription.description: The failover mode of the availability group replica.

sessionTimeout.description: The time-out period of availability group session replica, in seconds.

primaryAllowConnections.description: Whether the primary replica should allow all connections or only READ_WRITE connections (disallowing ReadOnly connections)

primaryRoleAllowConnectionsDescription.description: Whether the availability allows all connections or only read-write connections.

secondaryAllowConnections.description: Whether the secondary replica should allow all connections, no connections, or only ReadOnly connections.

secondaryRoleAllowConnectionsDescription.description: Whether an availability replica that is performing the secondary role (that is, a secondary replica) can accept connections from clients.

replicaCreateDate.description: Date that the replica was created.

replicaModifyDate.description: Date that the replica was modified.

backupPriority.description: Represents the user-specified priority for performing backups on this replica relative to the other replicas in the same availability group.

readOnlyRoutingUrl.description: Connectivity endpoint (URL) of the read only availability replica.

readWriteRoutingUrl.description: Connectivity endpoint (URL) of the read write availability replica.

seedingMode.description: Specifies how the secondary replica will be initially seeded. AUTOMATIC enables direct seeding. This method will seed the secondary replica over the network. This method does not require you to backup and restore a copy of the primary database on the replica. MANUAL specifies manual seeding (default). This method requires you to create a backup of the database on the primary replica and manually restore that backup on the secondary replica.

availabilityGroupReplicaRole.description: Current Always On availability groups role of the availability group replica.

operationalStateDescription.description: Current operational state of the availability group replica

recoveryHealthDescription.description: Recovery health of the availability group replica.

synchronizationHealthDescription.description: Reflects a rollup of the database synchronization state (synchronization_state) of all joined availability databases (also known as replicas) and the availability mode of the replica (synchronous-commit or asynchronous-commit mode). The rollup will reflect the least healthy accumulated state the databases on the replica.

connectedStateDescription.description: Whether a secondary replica is currently connected to the primary replica.

lastConnectErrorDescription.description: Text description of the last connection error of the availability group replica.

lastConnectErrorTimestamp.description: Date and time timestamp indicating when the last connect error occurred.

value.description: Array of Availability Group Database Replicas.

nextLink.description: Link to retrieve next page of results.

isLocal.description: Whether the availability database is local.

isPrimaryReplica.description: Returns 1 if the replica is primary, or 0 if it is a secondary replica.

isCommitParticipant.description: Whether this replica is transaction committer.

synchronizationHealthDescription.description: Description of the health of database.

databaseStateDescription.description: Description of the database state of the availability replica.

isSuspended.description: Whether this data movement is suspended.

suspendReasonDescription.description: Description of the database suspended state reason.

properties.description: Properties of Arc Sql Server database

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

logFileSizeMB.description: Total size in MB for the log (ldf) files for this database.

dataFileSizeMB.description: Total size in MB for the data (mdf and ndf) files for this database.

isReadOnly.description: Whether the database is read only or not.

databaseOptions.description: List of features that are enabled for the database

backupPolicy.description: The backup profile for the SQL server.

earliestRestoreDate.description: This records the earliest start date and time that restore is available for this database (ISO8601 format).

createMode.description: Database create mode. PointInTimeRestore: Create a database by restoring a point in time backup of an existing database. sourceDatabaseId and restorePointInTime must be specified.

sourceDatabaseId.description: The name of the source database associated with create operation of this database.

vmId.description: The unique ID of the hybrid machine that this resource belongs to.

restorePointInTime.description: Conditional. If createMode is PointInTimeRestore, this value is required. Specifies the point in time (ISO8601 format) of the source database that will be restored to create the new database.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Arc-enabled SQL Server database resource.

lastDatabaseUploadTime.description: The time when last successful database upload was performed.

isHekatonFilesOn.description: Whether the database uses the In-Memory OLTP feature for storing in-memory objects.

numberOfHekatonFiles.description: How many Hekaton files the DB has on disk, if it uses in-memory OLTP objects.

lastFullBackup.description: Date time of last full backup.

lastLogBackup.description: Date time of last log backup.

jobs.description: Migration jobs/actual data movement/data migrations associated with this database related information.

assessmentUploadTime.description: The time when Migration Assessment Report upload was last performed.

targetRecommendationGenerationTime.description: The UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format indicating when the latest target recommendations were generated for this database. This value is set as part of a successful RunTargetRecommendation job and is independent of when the migration readiness results were uploaded (assessmentUploadTime).

databaseAssessments.description: Issues and warnings impacting the migration of Database to particular Azure Migration Target.

targetReadiness.description: The target readiness for migration for this database.

numOfBlockerIssues.description: Number of blocker issues to fix before migrating this database to the target platform.

recommendationStatus.description: The target recommendation Status for this database.

monthlyCost.description: The monthly cost of the particular SKU.

monthlyCostOptions.description: The monthly cost for all different savings options applicable for the particular SKU.

storageMaxSizeInMb.description: max storage for this particular SKU, in MB.

predictedDataSizeInMb.description: The predicted data size in MB in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

predictedLogSizeInMb.description: The predicted log size in MB in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

maxStorageIops.description: The max storage IOPS in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

maxThroughputMBps.description: The max throughput in Azure SQL, will impact the billing cost.

computeTier.description: The compute tier of the target SKU.

hardwareType.description: The hardware type of the target SKU.

sqlPurchasingModel.description: The SQL purchasing model of the target SKU.

sqlServiceTier.description: The SQL service tier of the target SKU.

zoneRedundancyAvailable.description: Indicates if zone redundancy is available for the target SKU.

migrationTrackingId.description: Reference identifier for tracking purposes/optional link to system initiating this migration. e.g. Arc MI link job id, DMS resource id.

initiatedFrom.description: To indicate the client from which the migration is initiated from e.g. Azure Arc, DMS-Azure Portal/PS/CLI for additional tracking.

lastError.description: Last error if any associated with this migration job.

targetType.description: Type of target in Azure this database is being migrated to.

targetResourceId.description: Resource Id of the target SQL resource for this migration job.

startTime.description: Time when migration job was started.

endTime.description: Time when migration job reached terminal state.

availabilityGroupTypeFilter.description: Filter retrieval based on availability group type.

value.description: Array of Arc Sql Server Availability Groups.

nextLink.description: Link to retrieve next page of results.

properties.description: Properties of Arc Sql Server availability group

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

reportType.description: The report type that needs to be fetched. If not specified, the default is AssessmentSummary.

reportId.description: The GUID of the report to return best practices assessment results for. If not specified, summaries for all reports will be returned.

skipToken.description: The opaque token to use to skip to a specific page of the report. If not specified, the first page will be returned.

queryType.description: The type of query to run for summarizing the best practices assessment results. If not specified, the default is 'Basic'.

columns.description: The SQL best practices assessment response columns.

rows.description: An array of results of the SQL best practices assessment response.

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of the best practices assessment response for the SQL Server instance. Null, if no more pages are available.

name.description: The name of the result column.

type.description: The type of the result column.

featureName.description: The name of the feature to retrieve the jobs for.

jobType.description: The type of the job to retrieve the jobs for.

jobs.description: The list of jobs running on the SQL Server instance.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

instanceName.description: The name of the SQL Server instance.

jobException.description: The exception message if the job failed.

state.description: The state of the background job.

executionState.description: The execution state of the background job.

startTime.description: The start time of the background job.

endTime.description: The end time of the background job.

lastExecutionStatus.description: The last execution status of the background job.

lastExecutionTime.description: The last execution time of the background job in ISO 8601 date-time format.

nextExecutionTime.description: The next execution time of the background job in ISO 8601 date-time format.

actionId.description: The unique identifier of the sequencer action.

state.description: The state of the sequencer action.

result.description: The result of the sequencer action.

featureName.description: The name of the feature to retrieve the job status for.

jobType.description: The type of the job to retrieve the status for.

jobsStatus.description: The list of jobs status running on the SQL Server instance.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

instanceName.description: The name of the SQL Server instance.

jobException.description: The exception message if the job failed.

report.description: The migration readiness report as a serialized JSON string. When isCompressed is true, the value is base64-encoded GZip-compressed and must be decoded and decompressed before parsing.

isCompressed.description: Indicates whether the report field contains base64-encoded GZip-compressed JSON.

createdTime.description: The UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format indicating when the migration readiness report was created.

reportOffset.description: Zero-based offset indicating where to continue reading reports in the overall list of reports. Defaults to 0 if not provided. This value must be used together with the corresponding sectionOffset to resume pagination. The reportOffset advances only after all sections of the current report have been retrieved. To retrieve subsequent pages, use the nextReportOffset and nextSectionOffset values from the previous response.

sectionOffset.description: Zero-based offset indicating where to continue reading sections within the current report. Defaults to 0 if not provided. This value must be used together with the corresponding reportOffset to resume pagination. To retrieve subsequent pages, use the nextReportOffset and nextSectionOffset values from the previous response.

sectionType.description: Filters the report to a specific section type. If not specified, all section types are returned. Section types are grouped into two categories: requirements sections contain performance and resource metrics collected from the source SQL Server, while recommendation sections contain suggested Azure target SKUs derived from those requirements.

databaseNames.description: The list of database names to filter the report sections by. If not specified, sections for all databases are returned.

jobStatus.description: Represents the status of the latest target recommendation job. Report records are returned only when the job status is Succeeded.

reports.description: A collection of target recommendation reports. Returned only when the job status is Succeeded.

totalReportCount.description: The total number of target recommendation reports available for retrieval. Currently, only the latest report is returned, so this value is always 1.

nextReportOffset.description: The report offset to use in the next request along with nextSectionOffset to continue retrieving data. This value remains the same until all sections of the current report have been retrieved. Present only when there is more data to retrieve. When both nextReportOffset and nextSectionOffset are absent, all data has been returned.

nextSectionOffset.description: The section offset to use in the next request along with nextReportOffset to continue retrieving sections of the current report. Present only when there is more data to retrieve. When both nextReportOffset and nextSectionOffset are absent, all data has been returned.

reportId.description: The identifier of the target recommendation report.

createdTime.description: The UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format indicating when the target recommendation report was generated.

sections.description: Collection of sections included in the report.

data.description: Serialized JSON representation of the section data. If isCompressed is true, the value contains base64-encoded GZip-compressed JSON.

type.description: The type of this section. Requirements sections contain source server performance metrics, while recommendation sections contain suggested Azure target SKUs.

databaseName.description: The name of the database to which this section applies. An empty string indicates that the section contains instance-level data rather than database-level data.

isCompressed.description: Indicates whether the data field contains base64-encoded GZip-compressed JSON.

datasetName.description: The name of the telemetry dataset to retrieve.

startTime.description: The start time for the time range to fetch telemetry for. If not specified, the current time minus 1 hour is used.

endTime.description: The end time for the time range to fetch telemetry for. If not specified, the current time is used.

interval.description: The time granularity to fetch telemetry for. This is an ISO8601 duration. Examples: PT15M, PT1H, P1D

aggregationType.description: The aggregation type to use for the numerical columns in the dataset.

databaseNames.description: The list of database names to return telemetry for. If not specified, telemetry for all databases will be aggregated and returned.

columns.description: The columns of the result telemetry table for the SQL Server instance.

rows.description: A list of rows from the result telemetry table for the SQL Server instance.

nextLink.description: The link to the next section of rows of the telemetry response for the SQL Server instance. Null if no more sections are available.

name.description: The name of the telemetry column.

type.description: The type of the telemetry column.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

instanceName.description: The name of the SQL Server instance.

jobException.description: The exception message if the job failed.

azureManagedInstanceResourceId.description: The Azure SQL Managed Instance resource ID to link with the SQL Server instance.

azureManagedInstanceRole.description: The role of managed instance in a distributed availability group, can be Primary or Secondary.

databaseNames.description: An array of strings, where each value represents the name of a database to be replicated to the Azure SQL Managed Instance.

availabilityGroupName.description: The name of the availability group to be used for the database replication.

distributedAvailabilityGroupName.description: The name of the DAG to be used for the database replication. Also referred to as Link Name.

assessmentCategories.description: An array of strings, where each value represents the category of the assessment to be run. If this field is not provided, all assessment categories will be run.

sqlServerIpAddress.description: The IP address of the SQL Server instance.

assessments.description: The list of the results for MI Link assessment.

category.description: Validation category for the MI Link prerequisites assessment.

additionalInformation.description: Additional details about the check, including any recommended actions.

failingDbs.description: List of names of databases that are failing the given assessment.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

instanceName.description: The name of the SQL Server instance.

jobException.description: The exception message if the job failed.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

instanceName.description: The name of the SQL Server instance.

jobException.description: The exception message if the job failed.

resourceUpdateMode.description: Controls whether the SQL Server instance resource is updated with the target recommendation details after the job completes.

includeFileLevelRequirements.description: Specifies whether to include file-level requirements in the target recommendation report.

targetLocation.description: The Azure region used for target SKU pricing and availability (e.g., 'westus', 'eastus2', 'westeurope').

percentile.description: The percentile of performance data points used for aggregation (Range: 1-100).

lookbackPeriodInDays.description: The lookback period in days for performance data used in the target recommendation.

jobStatus.description: Represents the current status of the target recommendation job.

databases.description: List of databases to include in the availability group.

automatedBackupPreference.description: Preferred replica for running automated backups.

failureConditionLevel.description: User-defined failure condition level under which an automatic failover must be triggered.

healthCheckTimeout.description: Wait time (in milliseconds) for the sp_server_diagnostics system stored procedure to return server-health information, before the server instance is assumed to be slow or not responding.

dbFailover.description: Specifies whether the availability group supports failover for database health conditions.

dtcSupport.description: Specifies whether DTC support has been enabled for this availability group.

requiredSynchronizedSecondariesToCommit.description: The number of secondary replicas that must be in a synchronized state for a commit to complete.

clusterType.description: Set to WSFC when availability group is on a failover cluster instance on a Windows Server failover cluster. Set to NONE when availability group not using WSFC for cluster coordination.

listener.description: The listener for the sql server availability group

serverInstance.description: the server instance hosting the replica.

endpointName.description: Name of the database mirroring endpoint URL for the availability group replica

endpointUrl.description: Database mirroring endpoint URL of availability group replica

endpointAuthenticationMode.description: Permitted authentication modes for the mirroring endpoint.

certificateName.description: Name of certificate to use for authentication. Required if any CERTIFICATE authentication modes are specified.

endpointConnectLogin.description: The login which will connect to the mirroring endpoint

availabilityMode.description: Property that determines whether a given availability replica can run in synchronous-commit mode

failoverMode.description: Property to set the failover mode of the availability group replica

seedingMode.description: Specifies how the secondary replica will be initially seeded. AUTOMATIC enables direct seeding. This method will seed the secondary replica over the network. This method does not require you to backup and restore a copy of the primary database on the replica. MANUAL specifies manual seeding (default). This method requires you to create a backup of the database on the primary replica and manually restore that backup on the secondary replica.

backupPriority.description: Represents the user-specified priority for performing backups on this replica relative to the other replicas in the same availability group.

secondaryRoleAllowConnections.description: Whether the secondary replica should allow all connections, no connections, or only ReadOnly connections.

secondaryRoleReadOnlyRoutingUrl.description: Connectivity endpoint (URL) of the read only availability replica.

primaryRoleAllowConnections.description: Whether the primary replica should allow all connections or only READ_WRITE connections (disallowing ReadOnly connections)

primaryRoleReadOnlyRoutingList.description: List of read only routing URLs.

sessionTimeout.description: The time-out period of availability group session replica, in seconds.

primaryAvailabilityGroup.description: The initial primary availability group for the distributed availability group.

secondaryAvailabilityGroup.description: The initial secondary availability group for the distributed availability group.

availabilityGroup.description: The azure resource identifier for the availability group.

listenerUrl.description: The listener URL of the availability group.

availabilityMode.description: The availability mode of the availability group.

failoverMode.description: The failover mode of the availability group.

seedingMode.description: The seeding mode of the availability group.

certificateConfiguration.description: The certificate configuration for the availability group.

availabilityGroup.description: The configuration for the SQL Server availability group resource.

distributedAvailabilityGroup.description: The distributed availability group configuration for the MI link.

miLinkConfiguration.description: The MI Link specific distributed availability group configuration.

instanceAvailabilityGroupName.description: The name of the availability group to be created on the Managed Instance.

managedInstanceId.description: Azure resource id for the sql managed instance.

force.description: Whether to perform a Force Failover as opposed to just a regular Failover.
